calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2005 Continued To Dec-27-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 12/27/2005 at 1:30 p.m., in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair #1170 (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-26-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2005 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Lisa Sarto, CSR#8994. (212)
